'''Kalsunor''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Battle of Kalsunor|conquered]] by the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] sometime prior to the [[Golden Age of the Sith]]. It was close to [[Begeren]] and [[Ashas Ree/Legends|Ashas Ree]] and was located on the [[Kamat Aegit]].
{{Planet-stub}}

==History==
The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] employed huge [[Sith alchemy/Legends|alchemically]] [[Mutant|mutated]] [[Silooth/Legends|silooths]] to wreak havoc on the world before warriors came to finish the battle. Afterward, the Sith left a horde of silooths on Kalsunor, which continued to prey upon anything they could, and even larger and angrier silooths than those encountered abroad were rumored to exist in Kalsunor's deep canyons. The [[Battle of Kalsunor]] was the only known instance of more than a token use of these beasts, whose ferocity may have been too much even for the ancient Sith.

Around [[3638 BBY]], during the [[Galactic War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], the Republic succeeded in penetrating the [[Stygian Caldera]] and [[Battle of the Kalsunor system|captured]] the [[Kalsunor system/Legends|Kalsunor system]], though local products were still prevalent in and reaching the Empire as of the [[Third Galactic War]].<ref name="TOR" />

==Appearances==
